profiles.title: Senior Backend Engineer
profiles.overview: 8 years building distributed systems in Python and Go.

workExperiences.description: Led migration of monolith to microservices.

job_description: We need a Python expert with microservices experience.
global_preferences: Be concise. Use 5 sentences max. Use simple sentences focused on facts.
query: Cover letter — verify 5 sentences max and simple factual tone

profiles.title: Data Scientist
